issues.claim: No claim that the Gita is really a tech manual
issues.objection: 7.27 explicitly preserves the verse as a verse: literal_meaning, traditional_meaning_consensus, verbatim Shankara/Ramanuja under fair-use, source pack with full sectarian attribution. Engineering layer is presented as operational reflection at narrower scope, with STRETCHED tagging where appropriate. Translation field opens by acknowledging the metaphysical reach (where applicable) before describing the operational analog. The verse is not flattened into a productivity nugget. This verse is sharp and operationally robust (per chapter-7 thesis: STRONG operational analog).

notes: Tech-manual framing check for 7.27: the engineering layer is additive, not substitutive. PASS.
